reviews.review_description: This game is so fun. I love running like a gorilla. The floating islands are cool. Plz add bosses soon!

developer_response.body:
Hi hayes.51119,

Thank you for the 5 stars! We are really glad you love the movement and the floating islands. Adding bosses is a great idea—we will definitely keep that in mind for future updates! Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description: This game has great potential but is very buggy to the point were you can’t pick up your items. This game could be good if I could pick up a sword, but no it just sticks to the ground. Also there is only like 2 enemies and the game feels boring. So devs please fix the game it has great potential.

developer_response.body:
Hi b0ston.lamb,

Thank you for the feedback. We are glad you see potential in the game, but we are sorry about the bug with picking up items and the lack of variety you felt.

The issue with the sword sticking to the ground sounds like a bug we need to investigate immediately. Could you please join our Discord server at liminagames.com/discord and open a ticket? This will help us fix the issue for you. We are also working on adding more content and enemies.

Once we resolve these issues, we would be grateful if you could consider updating your rating. Thanks for helping us improve!

reviews.review_description: I finally got the iron sword and it’s super strong. Fighting with the moles is easier now.

developer_response.body:
Hi avacollins.348100,

Thank you for the 5 stars! Congrats on getting the iron sword! We are happy to hear it's helping you take down those moles more easily. Enjoy the fight!

reviews.review_description: I spent hours just mining gems. Then I went to the safe zone to sell them. It feels so satisfying. Good job devs!

developer_response.body:
Hi S.REED,

Thank you for the 5 stars and the kind words! It is great to hear that you find the mining and selling loop so satisfying. We appreciate your support and hope you keep enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
this game is super buns🤮🤮
dont get it

developer_response.body:
Hi Coolguy4569,

We are sorry to hear you didn't enjoy the game. We are constantly working to improve it, but we need more specific feedback to understand what went wrong.

If you're open to it, could you please join our Discord at liminagames.com/discord and let us know exactly what you didn't like? We'd appreciate the chance to make it better.

reviews.review_description: I like that you can use a shield. Most games don’t have that. The flower monster is annoying but fun to fight.

developer_response.body:
Hi MurpBella,

Thank you for the 5 stars! We are glad you appreciate the shield mechanic—it really changes the gameplay! That flower monster can be tricky, but we are happy to hear you are having fun fighting it. Good luck!

reviews.review_description: The 3rd sword looks and feels amazing. I am grinding gems to buy cool stuff. Everyone is nice in the game too.
I saw a bee and ran away but then I came back with my stone sword. It’s so cool. Can we get more monsters soon?
it's a good game but it's no players
